name: com.pulsemcp/ssh
description: MCP server for SSH remote server management with SSH agent authentication support.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Hostname or IP address of the SSH server.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_AUTH_SOCK
environmentVariables.description: Path to SSH agent socket for agent-based authentication.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to private key file for direct key authentication.

environmentVariables.name: SSH_COMMAND_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Default command activity timeout in milliseconds.

environmentVariables.name: ENABLED_TOOLGROUPS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable (readonly, write, admin).

environmentVariables.name: SKIP_HEALTH_CHECKS
environmentVariables.description: Skip SSH connection health check on startup.
